name: Veeam AWS Automation Platform
description: Automated platform using the Veeam for AWS API to deploy standardised backup appliances, providing a unified backup environment across the business.

name: 1Password SCIM Bridge
description: Designed and deployed a 1Password SCIM bridge into ECS Fargate to seamlessly manage Active Directory groups in 1Password.

name: Government Data Centre Migration
description: Multi-environment serverless platform using Lambda and ECS Fargate with full CI/CD pipeline, CloudWatch monitoring, and alerting.

name: AD Migration to AWS
description: Migrated 20,000+ Active Directory users from Windows Server 2003 to a security-hardened AWS Windows Server 2016 environment.

name: OIDC Terraform Module
description: Reusable Terraform module for OIDC-based access to AWS environments, improving security posture across CI/CD pipelines.

name: Linux HA Cluster Migration
description: Redeployed internal tools from Windows Server to a Linux & SQL high-availability clustered environment.

name: Home Assistant Add-on
description: Custom Home Assistant add-on for home automation and integration.

name: Home Lab Infrastructure
description: Personal home lab environment managed with Ansible for experimentation and learning.
